title: Dagown #1712
definition:
Dagon = "a fish"

 1) a Philistine deity of fertility; represented with the face and
    hands of a man and the tail of a fish
nasbUsage:
Definition: Dagon = "a fish"

 1) a Philistine deity of fertility; represented with the face and
    hands of a man and the tail of a fish

    NASB:  a god and an idol of the Philistines
